nodes.label: AI as file management and comparison tool

nodes.label: AI as content consolidation and editing assistant

nodes.label: AI writing style alignment with personal voice

nodes.label: AI use in workplace communication
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write emails myself because I think that others I work with are tuned into when something 'sounds' or 'reads' like it was at least partially AI generated

nodes.label: AI as coding and script writing accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: I have used AI to up my coding/script writing

nodes.label: AI as tool for specialized expert domain
nodes.grounding_span: I am an expert in a highly specialized field of biology that AI could not perform the vast majority of tasks with

nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write emails myself because I think that others I work with are tuned into when something 'sounds' or 'reads' like it was at least partially AI generated

nodes.label: Openness to retry AI for similar tasks despite past hallucination
